name: Ox Tail Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a quart saucepan. Brown ox tails on all sides.
2. Discard the oil. Add 1/2 package of seasoning and enough water to cover the ox tail.
3. Cook/simmer until almost tender (2-2 1/2 hours).
4. Add 1/2 pound frozen mixed vegetables and simmer for another 1/2 to 1 hour.
